description: Intent-only request: recognize 'important emails' as under-specified on the definition of importance.
processExpectations: The agent explains that whether 'important' is defined by fixed rules (workflow-anchored) or by open-ended judgment (agent-anchored) determines the classification, and the request does not specify which.
The agent identifies missing information about how 'important' is defined for this request, without asking the user a question.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
